purpose: Reference for every SSE event emitted on /events: dashboards_list, initialization, all_progress, init_state, agent_progress, logs, tasks_unblocked, dashboards_changed, queue_changed, write_rejected. Documents triggers, payload shapes, validation rules, the initial-data burst sequence, heartbeat, EventSource client usage, and per-client dashboard filtering.
gotchas: agent_progress events read with PROGRESS_READ_DELAY_MS (30ms) + retry to avoid mid-write JSON
write_rejected fires instead of agent_progress when task_id/dashboard_id mismatch
Heartbeat is a comment line (: ping) — invisible to EventSource clients
?dashboard= filter affects events 2-4 of initial burst but dashboards_list always full
patterns: Initial-data burst on connect for fast catch-up
